title: Echinopsis omasensis
taxonomy: Echinopsis omasensis is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Echinopsis, which includes various species of globular or columnar cacti. Within the genus, Echinopsis omasensis is a unique species that is distinct from others. The classification of Echinopsis omasensis is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. Further research is needed to fully understand the evolutionary relationships within the genus Echinopsis.
